scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/server && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/server && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
scripts.test:ui: node scripts/test-ui-layout.mjs && node scripts/test-loading-state.mjs && node scripts/test-settings-panel.mjs && node scripts/test-attachment-flow.mjs && node scripts/test-text-file-flow.mjs && node scripts/test-markdown-rendering.mjs && node scripts/test-chat-error-card.mjs && node scripts/test-streaming-placeholder.mjs && node scripts/test-runtime-handoff.mjs && node scripts/test-composer-shortcuts.mjs && node scripts/test-mobile-message-actions.mjs && node scripts/test-runtime-log-rendering.mjs && node scripts/test-drop-overlay.mjs
